summary: The most operationally significant development is the announcement that Iran has requested a meeting with the United States, scheduled for tomorrow in Doha, Qatar, amid ongoing regional tensions. In southern Lebanon, an Israeli reservist was seriously wounded by an explosion, and the IDF conducted airstrikes on three Hezbollah command posts in Nabatieh and Mayfadoun in response to Hezbollah's continued attacks on Israeli forces. In Gaza, the IDF and Shin Bet confirmed the killing of Ismail Masri, the chief of Hamas's military security in the Rafah Brigade, in a strike last week.
key_points: Iran has requested a meeting with the United States, which will take place tomorrow in Doha, Qatar, according to President Trump. (Source: @inon_yttach/9209)
An Israeli reservist was seriously wounded by an explosion in southern Lebanon and was evacuated to a hospital. (Source: @almogboker78/17627)

The Israeli Air Force struck three Hezbollah command posts in Nabatieh and Mayfadoun in southern Lebanon in response to Hezbollah's continued attacks on Israeli forces in the security zone. (Source: @inon_yttach/9203)
The IDF and Shin Bet confirmed the killing of Ismail Masri, chief of Hamas's military security in the Rafah Brigade, in an Israeli strike last week in the Gaza Strip. (Source: @idf_telegram/24471)
Israeli Defense Minister Katz stated that Israel has multiple targets prepared inside Iran for an operation called 'Blue and White' but will not act at this time. (Source: @rodast_omiddana/74522)

Qatar has advised all maritime vessels to temporarily suspend sailing and maritime activities, and Iran announced that $6 billion of its frozen funds in Qatar are expected to be released as part of the agreement with the US. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/4518)
An overnight Israeli strike on Khan Yunis ignited massive fires in Palestinian displacement tents. (Source: @presstv/196166)
Clashes erupted between terrorist groups and Iran's IRGC in Baveh, Kermanshah Province, with two IRGC members reported killed. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80360)

sections.executive_summary: The most operationally significant development is the announcement that Iran has requested a meeting with the United States, scheduled for tomorrow in Doha, Qatar, amid ongoing regional tensions. In southern Lebanon, an Israeli reservist was seriously wounded by an explosion, and the IDF conducted airstrikes on three Hezbollah command posts in Nabatieh and Mayfadoun in response to Hezbollah's continued attacks on Israeli forces. In Gaza, the IDF and Shin Bet confirmed the killing of Ismail Masri, the chief of Hamas's military security in the Rafah Brigade, in a strike last week.

points: Iran has requested a meeting with the United States, which will take place tomorrow in Doha, Qatar, according to President Trump. This comes amid broader diplomatic engagement between Tehran and Washington. (Source: @inon_yttach/9209)

Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian announced that $6 billion of Iran's frozen funds held in accounts in Qatar are expected to be released as part of the agreement with the United States. (Source: @asafroz/50837)

Clashes erupted between terrorist groups and Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) in Baveh, Kermanshah Province, with two IRGC members reported killed as an initial toll. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80360)

Preparations are underway in Tehran for the farewell ceremony honoring the martyred Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei, with the Coordination Framework calling for broad participation in mourning ceremonies in Iraqi territory. (Source: @presstv/196167)

Oman's Foreign Minister Badr al-Busaidi stated that Oman is committed to freedom of passage through the Strait of Hormuz and will not impose any transit fees, while emphasizing that the primary responsibility for securing the strait and clearing shipping lanes of mine threats lies with Iran. (Source: @VahidOnline/76745)

A 17-year-old named Yousef Miri was killed by a Basij bullet to the head on Hafez Street in Isfahan during recent unrest, with reports that his mother was told to remain silent about the incident. (Source: @VahidOnline/76746)

Israeli Defense Minister Katz stated that Israel has multiple targets prepared inside Iran for an operation called 'Blue and White' but will not act at this time. He also referenced a plan to topple the Iranian regime attributed to former Mossad chief Barnea, noting that external parties who were supposed to join were prevented from doing so. (Source: @rodast_omiddana/74522)

Defense Minister Katz stated that strikes on Hezbollah targets in Dahieh, combined with population evacuation, would have led to the practical collapse of Hezbollah, but the organization was spared a severe blow. He presented a situational assessment showing approximately 100% destruction in villages in the western sector up to Petah Tikva, approximately 73% destruction in the eastern sector, and that approximately 200,000 residents of southern Lebanon within the yellow line area will not return to their homes. (Source: @inon_yttach/9212)

The IDF announced a transformation in Border Infantry training, adding two months to the training track, a dedicated war week, and approximately 60 new Jaguar armored vehicles, which will shape the operational reality along the border lines. (Source: @idf_telegram/24473)
An Israeli reservist was seriously wounded by an explosion in southern Lebanon and was evacuated to a hospital; his family has been notified. (Source: @almogboker78/17627)
An incident occurred in southern Lebanon with details to be provided in forthcoming IDF spokesperson announcements. (Source: @pkpoi/143026)

The IDF and Shin Bet confirmed the killing of Ismail Masri, the chief of Hamas's military security in the Rafah Brigade, in an Israeli strike last week in the Gaza Strip. Masri was described as a senior figure responsible for advancing activities intended to harm the IDF's freedom of action in Gaza, and he coordinated security and counterintelligence fields in the Rafah Brigade during the war. (Source: @idf_telegram/24471)
An overnight Israeli strike on Khan Yunis ignited massive fires in Palestinian displacement tents. (Source: @presstv/196166)
An attack in Khan Yunis resulted in a number of casualties. (Source: @lelotsenzura/93306)
A terrorist was shot in Albira near Ramallah. (Source: @lelotsenzura/93305)

The Israeli Air Force struck three Hezbollah command posts in Nabatieh and Mayfadoun in southern Lebanon. The IDF stated the strikes were carried out in response to Hezbollah's continued attacks on Israeli forces in the security zone. (Source: @inon_yttach/9203)
An Israeli reservist was seriously wounded by an explosion in southern Lebanon and was evacuated to a hospital; his family has been notified. (Source: @almogboker78/17627)
The multi-dimensional unit attacked a Hezbollah launcher yesterday that posed a threat to Israeli forces. (Source: @inon_yttach/9203)

Defense Minister Katz presented a situational assessment showing approximately 100% destruction in villages in the western sector up to Petah Tikva, approximately 73% destruction in the eastern sector, and that approximately 200,000 residents of southern Lebanon within the yellow line area will not return to their homes. (Source: @inon_yttach/9212)
Following the signing of the agreement between Israel and Lebanon, CENTCOM Commander Admiral Brad Cooper met with President Joseph Aoun in Beirut. (Source: @asafroz/50846)
Raids were conducted in the Zayouna area east of the capital Baghdad for the second time, targeting the home of the Deputy Oil Minister. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80355)
The Coordination Framework called on its supporters to broadly participate in mourning ceremonies for the martyred Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in Iraqi territory. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80343)
Preparations were documented at the prayer site to receive the pure body of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, in preparation for public ceremonies in the Iranian capital Tehran. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80353)
Qatar has advised all maritime vessels to temporarily suspend sailing and other maritime activities until further notice. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/4518)

Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian announced that $6 billion of Iran's frozen funds held in accounts in Qatar are expected to be released as part of the agreement with the United States. (Source: @asafroz/50837)
Iran has requested a meeting with the United States, which will take place tomorrow in Doha, Qatar. (Source: @inon_yttach/9209)

Oman's Foreign Minister Badr al-Busaidi stated that Oman is committed to freedom of passage through the Strait of Hormuz and will not impose any transit fees, while emphasizing that the primary responsibility for securing the strait lies with Iran. (Source: @VahidOnline/76745)
French President Macron hosted Oman's Sultan Haitham bin Tariq at the Elysee Palace in Paris. (Source: @asafroz/50845)

key_developments: Iran has requested a meeting with the United States, which will take place tomorrow in Doha, Qatar, according to President Trump, signaling a potential diplomatic opening amid heightened regional tensions. (Source: @inon_yttach/9209)

An Israeli reservist was seriously wounded by an explosion in southern Lebanon and was evacuated to a hospital, underscoring the ongoing threat to Israeli forces along the border. (Source: @almogboker78/17627)

The Israeli Air Force struck three Hezbollah command posts in Nabatieh and Mayfadoun in southern Lebanon in response to Hezbollah's continued attacks on Israeli forces in the security zone. (Source: @inon_yttach/9203)
The IDF and Shin Bet confirmed the killing of Ismail Masri, chief of Hamas's military security in the Rafah Brigade, in an Israeli strike last week in the Gaza Strip. (Source: @idf_telegram/24471)
Israeli Defense Minister Katz stated that Israel has multiple targets prepared inside Iran for an operation called 'Blue and White' but will not act at this time. (Source: @rodast_omiddana/74522)

Qatar has advised all maritime vessels to temporarily suspend sailing and maritime activities, and Iran announced that $6 billion of its frozen funds in Qatar are expected to be released as part of the US agreement. (Source: @Faytuks_Network/4518)
An overnight Israeli strike on Khan Yunis ignited massive fires in Palestinian displacement tents, adding to the humanitarian crisis in the Gaza Strip. (Source: @presstv/196166)
sections.threat_assessment: The threat level across the Middle East remains elevated, with active hostilities ongoing in southern Lebanon and Gaza. Hezbollah continues to engage Israeli forces in the security zone, prompting Israeli airstrikes on command posts in Nabatieh and Mayfadoun. The IDF's destruction assessment in southern Lebanon — approximately 100% in the western sector and 73% in the eastern sector — indicates sustained combat operations. The scheduled US-Iran meeting in Doha introduces a diplomatic variable, though Israel's stated readiness for an operation inside Iran ('Blue and White') and the continued targeting of Hamas leadership in Gaza suggest military postures remain aggressive. Qatar's maritime suspension advisory adds a Gulf dimension to the threat picture.
sections.regional_response: Qatar is playing a central diplomatic role, hosting the upcoming US-Iran meeting and seeing the release of $6 billion in frozen Iranian funds as part of the broader agreement. Oman has publicly reaffirmed its commitment to freedom of passage through the Strait of Hormuz while placing responsibility for strait security on Iran. The Coordination Framework in Iraq is mobilizing public participation in mourning ceremonies for Ayatollah Khamenei, reflecting Iran's influence over Shia political networks in Iraq. CENTCOM Commander Admiral Brad Cooper's meeting with Lebanese President Joseph Aoun in Beirut signals continued US military engagement in Lebanon following the Israel-Lebanon agreement.
sections.intelligence_notes: The IDF and Shin Bet's confirmation of Ismail Masri's killing provides insight into Israel's continued targeting of Hamas's military security and counterintelligence apparatus in the Rafah Brigade, suggesting an effort to degrade Hamas's ability to reconstitute command and control. Defense Minister Katz's disclosure of the 'Blue and White' operation name and the reference to a regime-change plan attributed to former Mossad chief Barnea are unusual public revelations that may signal strategic messaging toward Iran. The IRGC clash with terrorist groups in Baveh, Kermanshah Province, indicates internal security challenges within Iran's western border region. The Qatari maritime suspension advisory, combined with the Strait of Hormuz transit discussions, warrants monitoring for potential escalation in Gulf waterways.
